content.text:
To implement `event_emitter.py` so that all `pytest` tests pass, I need to understand the structure and requirements of the existing codebase. Please provide the current state of `event_emitter.py` and any relevant test files.

If you have access to a specific directory or can share the content, I can inspect the files and make necessary changes to ensure all `pytest` tests are passing.
